creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 232000
finance/ticker: update to 4.5.0

Selected upstream changes:

 - improved documentation
 - better crypto support via coingecko quote source
 - upgraded dependencies
 - various stylistic fixes

Changelog:	https://github.com/achannarasappa/ticker/releases/tag/v4.5.0

Tested with Poudriere on armv7 arm64 FreeBSD 13.
